title: potentilla × caliacrae
intro: Potentilla × caliacrae, also known as the cream flower or golden pot, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Potentilla fruticosa and Potentilla recta. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin irritations, and fever, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Potentilla × caliacrae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its dried flowers and leaves can be used in folk medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
